## ExpressionNotifier interface

Enables evaluation of and subscription to a binding.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ExpressionNotifier<TSource = any, TReturn = any, TParent = any> extends Notifier, ExpressionObserver<TSource, TReturn, TParent>, Disposable 
```
**Extends:** [Notifier](./fast-element.notifier.md)<!-- -->, [ExpressionObserver](./fast-element.expressionobserver.md)<!-- -->&lt;TSource, TReturn, TParent&gt;, [Disposable](./fast-element.disposable.md)
